title: Frontend Development
description: Experienced in building responsive and performant web applications, with a strong focus on UX/UI — crafting interfaces that are both intuitive and visually compelling.

title: Backend Development
description: Linux user with solid experience in relational databases, service-based architectures, and REST API development. Comfortable designing systems that are clean, scalable, and maintainable.

title: Cloud
description: Hands-on experience with Azure and GCP cloud services. Skilled in Azure DevOps for CI/CD pipelines and familiar with Apigee for API management, enabling reliable and scalable cloud deployments.

title: IA
description: AI enthusiast with academic experience in deep learning, machine learning, and data mining. Familiar with business intelligence, leveraging data warehouses for analysis and visualization.
